title: Elie Wiesel的Night：从匈牙利到奥斯维辛
summary: 他在领诺奖时有一段著名的发言：Silence encourages the tormentor, never the tormented. Sometimes we must interfere. When human lives are endangered, when human dignity is in jeopardy, national borders and sensitivities become irrelevant.
content: 他在领诺奖时有一段著名的发言：Silence encourages the tormentor, never the tormented. Sometimes we must interfere. When human lives are endangered, when human dignity is in jeopardy, national borders and sensitivities become irrelevant.
